title: CVE-2026-23395 - Bluetooth: L2CAP: Fix accepting multiple L2CAP_ECRED_CONN_REQ

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - CVE-2026-23395 - Bluetooth: L2CAP: Fix accepting multiple L2
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/27
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*www.bluetooth.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
